title: Assistant Store Manager - Walmart India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Walmart India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
